City of Redmond Planning DepartmentUnknownRedmondGIS.DBO.CityLimitFirstvector digital data SMMS_Citation_Linkages_Hyperlinked: false SMMS_Citation_Source_Time_Period: UnknownRedmondGIS.DBO.CityLimitServer=GeminiDB; Service=sde:sqlserver:GeminiDB; Database=RedmondGIS; Version=dbo.DEFAULTThe dataset contains City of Redmond City Limits in a form of area geometries. The feature is derived from annexation history feature. The data set originated in the Planning Department and is currently being maintained by the GIS ServicesTo identify the official City of Redmond City Limits which support variety of City's programs and mapping purposesen2000unknownPresentunknownground conditionIn workContinually-122.165551-122.03256547.71725347.6263761312485.2765351344717.427000231316.421875263939.469999RedmondLandbaseAnnexationCityGrowthPlanningLimitAll access to the dataset will be as Read-OnlyDistribution to the consultant and customers should be processed through the GIS Services Group, Finance and Information Services department. All requestors are required to fill a request form and sign disclaimer statementmailing and physical address15670 NE 85th ST, MS:3SFNRedmondWA98052USA(425) 556-2134(425) 556-4200!_gisservices@redmond.govMonday-Friday 9AM to 5PM SMMS_Contact_Email_Hyperlinked: true City of Redmond, GIS ServicesSMMS_ID_Browse_Graphic_Hyperlinked: 0Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000UnknownAnnexation HistoryFirstmap SMMS_Citation_Linkages_Hyperlinked: false SMMS_Citation_Source_Time_Period: SMMS_Type: 1 SMMS_Dataset_Capture_Browse: true SMMS_Dataset: SMMS_Dataset_NorthArrow: 0 SMMS_Dataset_Legand: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer: SMMS_DatasetLayer_Order: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Type: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Location: \\SID\GISUSER\geographic_information\Data\LandBase\CityLimit.mdb SMMS_DatasetLayer_Name: citylimit SMMS_DatasetLayer_LabelVisible: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Style1: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Color: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Weight: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer: SMMS_DatasetLayer_Order: 1 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Type: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Location: \\BUZZ\GISUSER\geographic_information\Data\LandBase\MasterParcel.mdb SMMS_DatasetLayer_Name: RightOfWay SMMS_DatasetLayer_LabelVisible: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Style1: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Color: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Weight: 0 SDE Feature Classnonenonenonenone11 footnoneUnknownAnnexation HistoryFirstmap SMMS_Citation_Linkages_Hyperlinked: false SMMS_Citation_Source_Time_Period: unknownCity ordinance documentsData was created in Arc Info. System-generated username of who most recently modified the featureDateModifiDateModifiDate800GlobalIDGlobalIDString3800Unique identification automatically calculated by ArcGIS and used with geodatabase replicationShape_STArShape_STArDouble1900Shape_STLeShape_STLeDouble1900City Limit polygons (areas) derived from annexation history featureGIS Services, Planning Departmentmailing and physical address15670 NE 85th ST, MS:3SFNRedmondWA98073USA(425) 556-2134(425) 556-4200!_gisservices@redmond.govMonday-Friday 9AM to 5PM SMMS_Contact_Email_Hyperlinked: true City of Redmond, GISServicesSMMS_Distribution_Type: 1 SMMS_Distribution_Name: GIS Data Distribution Downloadable Data2011042520041208mailing and physical address15670 NE 85th ST, MS:3FSNRedmondWA98073USA(425) 556-2134(425) 556-4200!_gisservices@redmond.govMonday-Friday 9AM to 5PM SMMS_Contact_Email_Hyperlinked: true City of Redmond, GIS ServicesFGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial MetadataFGDC-STD-001-1998local timeen User_Defined_Information: User_Defined_Text: Label: Database Description Value: \\sid\gisuser\geographic_information\data\landbase\CityLimit.mdb Hyperlinked: 0 User_Defined_List_Value: Label: 2018011709532600FALSE20260601230658002026060123065800DeleteField "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.CITYLIMIT" CityLimitID "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.CITYLIMIT"DeleteFeatures DBO.CityLimit_LayerDeleteFeatures DBO.CityLimit_LayerAppend G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\GISServices\10496ParcelCityLimitAnnexBndyAlignment\02Data\ParcelCityLimitAnnexAlignment2.mdb\Data\CityLimitExport_Final DBO.CityLimit_Layer TEST # # # #CityLimit0021312486.6000081344717.427935231314.962692263939.4699501file://\\redmond.man\fs\GISUser\GIS\MaintenanceOperations\zDataDistribution\Cadastral\CityLimit.shpLocal Area Network0.000ProjectedGCS_North_American_1983_HARNLinear Unit: Foot_US (0.304801)NAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Washington_North_FIPS_4601_FeetPROJCS["NAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Washington_North_FIPS_4601_Feet",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983_HARN",DATUM["D_North_American_1983_HARN",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",1640416.666666667],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-120.8333333333333],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",47.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",48.73333333333333],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",47.0],UNIT["Foot_US",0.3048006096012192],AUTHORITY["EPSG",2926]],VERTCS["NGVD_1929",VDATUM["National_Geodetic_Vertical_Datum_1929"],PARAMETER["Vertical_Shift",0.0],PARAMETER["Direction",1.0],UNIT["Foot_US",0.3048006096012192],AUTHORITY["EPSG",5702]]-117104300-9953960037926742.22403606-1000003048.0060960121918-100000100000.00328083333333333310.00328083333333333310.001true29262926570257021.01500000005000FGDCMicrosoft Windows Server 2016 Technical Preview Version 10.0 (Build 20348) ; Esri ArcGIS 13.3.0.51575CityLimit1312485.2765351344717.427263939.469999231316.4218751-122.165551-122.03256547.71725347.62637611-122.165546-122.03256547.71725347.626372Layer identifying the boundaries of the incorporated city limits of Redmond.

A polygon layer depicting the boundaries of the incorporated city limits of Redmond.The feature is derived from the annexation history layer. The data set originated in the Planning Department and is currently being maintained by the GIS Services

LandbaseAnnexationCityGrowthPlanning

While the data have been tested for accuracy and are properly functioning, the City of Redmond disclaims any responsibility for the accuracy or correctness of the data.

The foregoing warranty is exclusive and in lieu of all other warranties of merchantability, fitness for particular purpose and/or any other type whether expressed or implied.

In no event shall the City of Redmond become liable to users of these data, or any other party, for any loss or damages, consequential or otherwise, including but not limited to time, money, or goodwill, arising from the use, operation or modification of the data. In using these data, users further agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless City of Redmond for any and all liability of any nature arising out of or resulting from the lack of accuracy or correctness of the data, or the use of the data.

Please acknowledge the City of Redmond as a source when City of Redmond data are used in the preparation of reports, papers, publications, maps, and other products.

To ensure that appropriate documentation and data limitations are provided, these databases should not be redistributed to any other parties.
